title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 07 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 07 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 07 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/03/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.34% today, the main contract closed at 909.5.The traders' willingness to ship is less.The steel mills are wait and see.The overall trading senƟment of the market is worse.PBF at Shandong port deal 915-916 yuan/mt,increase 5-20 yuan/ mt;PBF at Tangshan port deal 933 yuan/mt,increase 17yuan/mt. Recently, the relevant state departments concerned about the problem of iron ore prices rising too fast, which has conƟnued to cause hot discussion in the market, and the market mentality is different. According to the data of the General AdministraƟon of Customs today, China imported 19.4196 million tons of iron ore and its concentrate in January-February, up 7.3% year on year, with a slight increase in the supply side of iron ore.
